title: selaginella wattii
intro: Selaginella wattii, also known as Watt's spikemoss, is a species of evergreen, terrestrial or epiphytic plant in the family Selaginellaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Selaginella wattii include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to promote wound healing, reduce oxidative stress, and prevent the growth of certain microorganisms. Selaginella wattii can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional due to potential side effects and interactions.
